Client Reviews

4.7/5 average rating from 6+ happy clients

What Our Clients Say

Real feedback from homeowners and businesses who trust Wonderwoman Construction to get the job done right.

“Wonderwoman Construction completely transformed our outdated kitchen into a modern, functional space. They listened to our needs and preferences and delivered a kitchen that exceeded our expectations. The team was professional, efficient, and kept us informed throughout the entire process. Highly recommend!”

Sarah M. Kitchen Remodeling
Mar 15, 2025

“We hired Wonderwoman Construction to finish our unfinished basement, and we're thrilled with the results. They created a comfortable and inviting family room that we now use all the time. The only minor issue was a slight delay in the project timeline, but they communicated proactively and made sure everything was completed to our satisfaction.”

David L. Basement Finishing
Nov 20, 2024

“After a severe storm, our roof was damaged, and we needed a quick and reliable roofing contractor. Wonderwoman Construction responded promptly and provided a thorough inspection and estimate. They replaced our roof efficiently and professionally, and we haven't had any issues since. Great service!”

Emily K. Roofing Services
Sep 5, 2024

“Wonderwoman Construction did an outstanding job remodeling our master bathroom. They helped us design a beautiful and functional space that feels like a spa. The craftsmanship was excellent, and the team was respectful of our home and schedule. We couldn't be happier!”

John S. Bathroom Remodeling
Jul 12, 2024

“We chose Wonderwoman Construction to install new siding on our home, and we're very pleased with the results. The new siding looks great and has significantly improved our home's curb appeal. The installation team was professional and efficient, and they cleaned up thoroughly after the job was done. A few minor communication hiccups, but overall, a positive experience.”

Lisa P. Siding Installation
May 1, 2024

“We replaced our old, drafty windows with energy-efficient windows from Wonderwoman Construction, and we've already noticed a difference in our heating bills. The new windows look great and have made our home much more comfortable. The installation was quick and professional, and the team was very knowledgeable and helpful.”

Michael R. Window Replacement
Feb 18, 2024
